description: Auto-capture Primary Children's Pediatric Grand Rounds from YouTube every Thursday
cronNote: Every Thursday at 12:00 PM local time (Mountain). Gives the 8-9 AM session time to end and archive.
instructions: Create this scheduled task in an interactive Cowork session using: Skill → schedule

channel.channelName: PGR PCH — Primary Children's Pediatric Grand Rounds
channel.schedule: Every Thursday, 8:00–9:00 AM MT, September through May

pipeline.step3_notify: Report results — new lectures captured, transcripts extracted, AI analysis generated

retryLogic.note: Archives can take up to a week. If no new video found on Thursday, retry Friday.
retryLogic.retryCondition: Only if Thursday found no new videos

summerBreak.behavior: Report that series is on summer break, skip capture
